jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
